html:
Exclusive to:

Hard Shell Tacos is a Crock Pot dish introduced in the Hamlet DLC. It requires exactly two Weevole Carapaces and one Vegetable.

Hard Shell Tacos restore 20 Health, 37.5 Hunger and 5 Sanity when eaten.

Hard Shell Tacos are counted as a vegetable dish, therefore Wigfrid cannot eat them.

Prerequisites

  • Requires: 
  • Requires: 
  • Excludes: (Mandrake)

Recipe

×2

Examples

×2

Trivia

  • During the Pig Fiesta event, Hard Shell Tacos take on a more festive appearance.

Tóm tắt

Tacos Vỏ Cứng là món Nồi Hầm được giới thiệu trong Hamlet DLC. Nó yêu cầu chính xác hai Mai Weevole và một Rau.

'''Hard Shell Tacos''' is a [[Crock Pot]] dish introduced in the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It requires exactly two [[Weevole Carapace]]s and one [[Vegetable]].

Hard Shell Tacos restore 20 [[Health]], 37.5 [[Hunger]] and 5 [[Sanity]] when eaten.

Hard Shell Tacos are counted as a vegetable dish, therefore Wigfrid cannot eat them.

== Prerequisites ==
* Requires: [[File:Weevole Carapace.png|link=Weevole Carapace]]
* Requires: [[File:Crock Pot Vegetables (no Mandrake).png|link=Vegetables]]
* Excludes: [[File:Mandrake.png|link=Mandrake]] (Mandrake)

== {{pic|32|Cookbook}} Recipe ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Weevole Carapace
|count1 = 2
|item2 = Vegetables
|item3 = Filler
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Hard Shell Tacos
}}

== Examples ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Weevole Carapace
|count1 = 2
|item2 = Cooked Green Cap
|item3 = Twigs
|tool = Crock Pot
|result = Hard Shell Tacos
}}

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* During the [[Pig Fiesta]] event, Hard Shell Tacos take on a more festive appearance.
